Name: Weather App
ShortDesc: Search any city worldwide with 7-day forecast
LongDesc: A comprehensive weather application that allows users to search for any city worldwide and view detailed 7-day weather forecasts. Features include multi-language support, clean responsive UI, and real-time weather data updates.
Features: Search any city worldwide,7-day weather forecast,Clean responsive UI,Multi-language support

Name: News App
ShortDesc: Latest news from multiple sources with advanced search
LongDesc: A modern news aggregation app that fetches latest news from multiple sources. Features advanced search functionality, category filtering, and WebView integration for full article reading experience.
Features: Latest news from multiple sources,Advanced search functionality,WebView integration for articles,Category filtering

Name: Notes App
ShortDesc: Secure offline note management with categories
LongDesc: A productivity app for managing notes with full CRUD operations. Features include category organization, secure offline storage using Hive database, and a clean intuitive interface.
Features: Add, edit, and delete notes,Organize notes by categories,Secure offline storage,Clean intuitive UI

Name: Chat App
LongDesc: A real-time chat application with user authentication, real-time messaging using Firebase Firestore, and a modern chat UI with message bubbles and typing indicators.
Features: User Authentication,Real-time messaging,Modern chat UI with message bubbles,Typing indicators,Online status
